name: Pickled Yellow Banana Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix vinegar with water and bring to a boil.
2. Wash the yellow banana peppers, cutting off the top only (leaving seeds in place or removing them as desired).
3. Pack the peppers into quart jars, placing one clove of garlic per jar and 1 tsp. salt and 1 tsp. pickling spice on each layer.
4. Ladle the vinegar/water mixture over the peppers, leaving a 1-inch headspace.
5. Securely fasten the lids onto the jars.
6. Process the jars in a water bath for 10 minutes.
